path: Problem: Return a value from a table where a text field contains multiple required substrings (criteria) in any position with inconsistent delimiters
Action: Use SEARCH to test substring presence for each criterion, combine criteria via arithmetic, and use LOOKUP to return the last matching record

Observation: SEARCH returns a number when found and an error when not; dividing 1 by SEARCH coerces found/not-found into 1/error, and multiplying (or chaining divisions) creates an AND condition across multiple substrings; LOOKUP(2,...) ignores errors and selects the last numeric match
